memberdef.definition: Set *accessors to read write values * Boon::Variant::Variant
memberdef.name: Variant

briefdescription.para: A lightweight discriminated union used to hold simple values.

detaileddescription.para: Supports a fixed set of scalar and vector types. Use GetType to inspect the stored type and the As

briefdescription.para: Generic typed getter that maps T to a concrete As* accessor.

detaileddescription.para: Only the set of supported types in the implementation are allowed.

briefdescription.para: Generic typed setter that maps T to a concrete Set* implementation.

detaileddescription.para: Only the supported types are accepted; unsupported types will trigger a compile-time error via static_assert.
